metadata.description: Determine how and where to add Likert thematic phrases (GPT 5.1 Pro generated) to NHB2026, ACM2026, arxiv, and other manuscript versions

summary: Implemented Option C for Likert thematic phrases: added design-matrix summary table (Supplementary Table S4) with 25 representative examples to all 4 manuscript versions (NHB2026, ACM2026, general_manuscript, arxiv), updated methods text to describe the 5×5×10 factorial design, updated Supplementary Methods LLM usage, and copied full CSV to main repo root for public access.

decision.description: How to incorporate the 250 Likert thematic phrases into manuscripts: (A) full supplementary table of all 250 phrases, (B) representative sample table with full CSV in repo, or (C) design-matrix summary table with examples + CSV in repo
decision.rationale: The current methods text mentions "250 synthetic Likert-style anchor statements" but provides no detail about the 5×5×10 structure (themes × Likert levels × writing styles) or the actual phrases. For reproducibility and reviewer scrutiny, the phrases need to be accessible. Full inclusion (250 rows) would add ~8-10 pages to supplementary; a representative sample balances transparency with brevity.
decision.revision_note: Option C selected: design-matrix summary table with representative examples in supplementary + full CSV in GitHub repo

annotation.content: Added Likert thematic phrases documentation to all 4 manuscript versions (NHB2026, ACM2026, general_manuscript, arxiv). Changes: (1) Updated methods text "Public Probes" paragraph to describe the 5×5×10 factorial design and reference Supplementary Table S4. (2) Added new Supplementary Table S4 with 25 representative examples (1 per theme × Likert level) showing diverse discourse styles. (3) Updated Supplementary Methods LLM usage section to reference the factorial design and table. (4) Copied likert_thematic_phrases.csv to main repo root.

contribution.description: Added Likert thematic phrases documentation (Supplementary Table S4) to 4 manuscript versions
